name: javascript
description: JavaScript stack: ESM imports, strict mode, no implicit coercions, colocated test files.

rules.guidance: Use ES module syntax (import/export). Avoid CommonJS require() in new code unless the target runtime enforces it. Explicit file extensions in import paths.
Enable 'use strict' or use ESM (which is strict by default). Avoid implicit globals, with-statements, and delete on non-configurable properties.
Use strict equality (===, !==). Explicit type conversions (Number(), String(), Boolean()). Avoid truthiness checks on values that could be 0 or empty string unintentionally.
Test files live next to the source file they test (e.g. module.test.js). Integration and e2e tests may live in a dedicated __tests__ or tests directory.
Always handle promise rejections (try/catch in async, .catch() on promise chains). Unhandled rejections must not be silently swallowed.
